prompt: Create a loading animation component that's smooth and modern. The animation should morph between 3-4 geometric shapes (circle → square → hexagon → circle) while changing colors. Include a percentage counter that ticks from 0 to 100 over 5 seconds. Make it feel premium and satisfying.

assertions.text: SVG shapes morph smoothly between circle, square, hexagon, and back to circle
assertions.evidence: SVG path animations transition smoothly between all four shapes with proper easing
Color palette shifts through Indigo → Pink → Amber → Purple in sync with shape morphing

assertions.text: Percentage counter ticks from 0 to 100 over exactly 5 seconds
assertions.evidence: Counter uses requestAnimationFrame to increment smoothly from 0-100 in 5000ms

assertions.text: Professional, premium feel with modern typography and smooth easing
assertions.evidence: Modern font stack (Inter, system fonts), cubic-bezier easing, drop shadows, and professional layout
After 5-second cycle, animation resets and repeats continuously

assertions.text: Self-contained HTML file with no external dependencies
assertions.evidence: Single HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript, no external imports

assertions.text: Includes subtle rotation and scale effects for visual interest
assertions.evidence: 30% rotation per cycle and ±5% scale pulse applied to shape, plus rotating background glow
